summary: Global SVG filters and CSS textures are defined and ready. SVGFilters.jsx provides paper-noise, ink-soft, grain, and ink-paper filter definitions using feTurbulence/feGaussianBlur/feDisplacementMap. colors.css defines the ink/paper/accent color palette with CSS custom properties. textures.css creates a CSS-only paper texture background and fallback utility classes (.ink-shadow, .ink-border, .paper-card, .ink-text). SVGFilters is imported and rendered globally in App.jsx; all CSS files are imported in main.jsx. Build passes successfully.
